title: AI Agents
planLimitsDesc: You are currently on the <0>{{plan}}</0> plan. You can create up to <1>{{botsLimit}}</1> Chatbot{{botsPlural}} and connect <2>{{integrationsLimit}}</2> Integration{{integrationsPlural}} per chatbot.
limitReachedTooltip: You have reached your limit of {{limit}} chatbot{{plural}} for this plan.

empty.message: No chatbots yet — create your first one

messages.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? All data associated with this bot will be permanently removed.
messages.deleteSuccess: Chatbot and all its data deleted successfully

integration_errors.httpsRequired: Facebook integration requires a secure connection (HTTPS). Please ensure you are using your secure tunnel URL (e.g., https://...) instead of localhost.
integration_errors.sdkLoadError: Facebook SDK could not be loaded. Please check your internet connection or disable ad-blockers.
